title: Can't simulate synthesized for intel/cyclonev design in iverilog.

features.name: lhs concatenation with multi-operand addition carry
features.description: Code should include a concatenation on the left-hand side of a continuous assignment where the right-hand side is a multi-operand addition, inferring carry-out logic into the upper concatenation element
features.snippet:
wire carry, result;
assign {carry, result} = cin + y + x;

features.name: preprocessor conditional guarding alternate assignments
features.description: Code should include preprocessor ifdefifndef conditional blocks that select between different assignment expressions for the same target signals

features.name: incrementing register with repeat loop and delay
features.description: Code should include an initial block that increments a register inside a repeat loop with procedural delay controls to create a simple test stimulus
